meta.label: region
meta.content: An administrative / political area: country, state, county, city, EEZ. Distinct from `location` (a point) and `path` (a line).

kind.description: country | state | province | county | city | district | eez | other

_provenance.rationale: Renamed from `jurisdiction`; broadened to include any administrative area (cities, EEZs) rather than just political authority.
